Chris Weise

Hi, I'm Chris Weise. For the last 20 years, I have worked in ministry serving students, children, and families. Now, I am excited about moving into the cloud realm and showing the same passion and drive to work and serve an organization by providing the cloud solutions that are essential to evolve and make an impact.
